Game.Name: Rin Kaihou Kudan no Igo Daidou
Game.Plot: Rin Kaihou Kudan no Igo Daidou ("9th Dan Rin Kaihou's Go Avenue") is a Go game for the Super Famicom that features the name and likeness of Chinese-born professional Go player Rin Kaihou. The game was published by magazine giant Ask Kodansha and developed by an unknown contract developer. The game provides several modes, including a standard versus game and set-piece scenarios where the player has to successfully complete (and sometimes rescue) a mid-game state.
